creator: dan@obluda.cz
text:
It's impossible to create package for net/xorp:

make -DWITH_OPTIMIZATION -DWITH_DEBUGGING -DWITH_OPENSSL_PORT -DWITHOUT_OPENSSL_BASE package
...
<<< the compilation and installation has completed with no problem >>>

Fix: 

Unfortunatelly, I can't offer a fix in that case.
How-To-Repeat: 	See description
